creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Installing graphics/luxrender, which implies the installation of graphics/freeimage, crashes with the following error:

libpng warning: Application built with libpng-1.4.8 but running with 1.5.4
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

There is no graphics/png port with version 1.5.4, the recent FreeBSD port graphics/png is version 1.4.8!

How-To-Repeat: Install graphics/luxrender and try starting luxrender.
